# Aria Han

> AI systems architect. Writer. Systems thinker. Building infrastructure for multi-agent coordination.

## Core
- [About](https://ariaxhan.com/about): background, focus areas, current work
- [Writing](https://ariaxhan.com/writing): essays on AI systems, agents, vector native interfaces
- [Open Source](https://ariaxhan.com/open-source): KERNEL plugin, AgentDB, tooling
- [Systems](https://ariaxhan.com/systems): architectural patterns and multi-agent coordination
- [Timeline](https://ariaxhan.com/timeline): project and company milestones
- [Vector Native](https://ariaxhan.com/vn): research on notation for model internals
- [Evidence](https://ariaxhan.com/evidence): proof of work, outputs, receipts
- [Contact](https://ariaxhan.com/contact): how to reach me

## Agent Resources
- [llms-full.txt](https://ariaxhan.com/llms-full.txt): full concatenated content
- [Agent Card](https://ariaxhan.com/.well-known/agent-card.json)
- [MCP Server Card](https://ariaxhan.com/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json)
- [API Catalog](https://ariaxhan.com/.well-known/api-catalog)
- [Agent Skills](https://ariaxhan.com/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json)

## Preferences
- ai-train: no
- ai-input: yes (cite source)
- search: yes
